rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VERA TUCKER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Approving Final Distribution On Grounds Of Extrinsic Fraud Or Mistake
rulings.Rulings: Hearing required. The Court is inclined to vacate the order of final distribution. A new, proper petition would be required for any alternate final distribution. The Court will also consider, on its own motion, whether to vacate the order appointing Ms. Carr as administrator and suspending her letters of administration in light of her misrepresentations to the Court and her lack of diligence with respect to the affairs of the estate. Ms. Carr (with her attorney if she is still represented) and Mr. Tucker are expected to be present.
